momentum_breakout.description: Mid/large cap stocks with strong momentum and rising volume
momentum_breakout.screener_query: Market Capitalization > 500 AND Volume > 500000 AND RSI > 55 AND RSI < 75 AND Return over 3Months > 10 AND Price to Earning < 40 AND MACD Signal > 0

oversold_reversal.description: Oversold quality stocks showing early reversal signals
oversold_reversal.screener_query: Market Capitalization > 200 AND RSI < 35 AND Return over 1Year > 0 AND Debt to equity < 1 AND Return on equity > 12

smallcap_growth.description: Small cap high growth companies with low PE
smallcap_growth.screener_query: Market Capitalization < 500 AND Market Capitalization > 50 AND Sales growth > 20 AND Profit growth > 20 AND Price to Earning < 25 AND RSI > 50

dividend_value.description: Blue chip value stocks with strong dividend support
dividend_value.screener_query: Dividend yield > 2 AND Price to Earning < 20 AND Return on equity > 15 AND Debt to equity < 0.5 AND Market Capitalization > 1000

quality_at_fair_value.description: High ROCE, low debt, reasonably priced quality businesses
quality_at_fair_value.screener_query: Return on capital employed > 20 AND Debt to equity < 0.3 AND Price to Earning < 30 AND Sales growth > 12 AND Market Capitalization > 1000

high_roce_compounder.description: Long-duration compounders with consistently high ROCE and earnings growth
high_roce_compounder.screener_query: Return on capital employed > 25 AND Profit growth > 15 AND Sales growth > 15 AND Debt to equity < 0.5 AND Price to Earning < 50 AND Market Capitalization > 500

undervalued_midcap.description: Midcap stocks trading below intrinsic value with earnings support
undervalued_midcap.screener_query: Market Capitalization > 500 AND Market Capitalization < 5000 AND Price to Earning < 15 AND Return on equity > 15 AND Profit growth > 10 AND Debt to equity < 1

sector_rotation_infra.description: Infrastructure and capital goods stocks with order book momentum
sector_rotation_infra.screener_query: Market Capitalization > 200 AND Sales growth > 15 AND Return on capital employed > 12 AND RSI > 50 AND RSI < 72 AND Debt to equity < 1.5

turnaround_candidates.description: Stocks recovering from a downturn with improving fundamentals
turnaround_candidates.screener_query: Return over 1Year < 0 AND Profit growth > 10 AND Sales growth > 5 AND RSI > 45 AND RSI < 65 AND Market Capitalization > 100 AND Debt to equity < 2

fii_buying_largecap.description: Large cap stocks with strong fundamentals and recent price strength
fii_buying_largecap.screener_query: Market Capitalization > 10000 AND RSI > 55 AND RSI < 72 AND Return over 3Months > 5 AND Return on equity > 15 AND Debt to equity < 1
